backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Concept Delta app, defining data types (UserProfile, Question, Test, TestResult) and backend logic including admin management, user registration, question/test CRUD, and result submission with leaderboard support.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two frontend features—fixing `useIsCallerAdmin` query behavior and fixing Admin Panel link visibility in Navbar—to their respective files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend source files, describing the purpose and key implementation details of each component, page, hook, and admin sub-component in the project.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens (background, foreground, primary, chart colors, sidebar, etc.) used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Concept Delta React app, mounting the app into a `#root` div and loading the main TypeScript entry point as an ES module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with five routes: Home (/), Dashboard (/dashboard), Test (/test/$testId), Admin (/admin), and Results (/results), with a global Toaster notification component.
frontend/src/components/admin/AddQuestio: Admin modal dialog for adding a new question by uploading a question image and selecting the correct answer option (A–D), using the useAddQuestion hook to submit.
frontend/src/components/admin/Leaderboar: Admin leaderboard component that fetches and displays a ranked table of students sorted by average score, with color-coded rank badges and score highlights.
frontend/src/components/admin/QuestionGa: Admin gallery view that lists all questions in a responsive grid with their images and correct answer labels, and includes a button to open the AddQuestionModal.
frontend/src/components/admin/ResultsLis: Admin component that fetches and displays all test submission results in a table showing user, test name, score, and submission timestamp.
frontend/src/components/admin/TestBuilde: Admin component for creating new tests by selecting questions, setting name/duration/subject, and managing publish/unpublish state of existing tests.
frontend/src/components/admin/UserList.t: Admin component that fetches and displays all registered users in a table showing their name, class, and contact number.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: Sticky navy navbar component that handles login/logout via Internet Identity, conditionally shows the Admin Panel link only when the user is authenticated and confirmed as admin (suppressed during loading to prevent flicker), and refetches admin status on identity changes.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Full-screen modal for first-time users to set up their profile by entering full name, class (11th/12th/Dropper), and contact number, with validation and backend save via `useSaveCallerUserProfile`.
Renders a single quiz question with its image and four labeled answer option buttons (A–D), highlighting the selected answer and showing progress (e.g., Q2/10).
frontend/src/components/TestCard.tsx: Displays a summary card for a test including its name, subject, duration, and question count, with a 'Start Test' button that navigates to the test route.
frontend/src/components/TestTimer.tsx: Countdown timer component that counts down from a given duration in seconds, triggers a callback when time expires, and turns red with a pulsing icon in the last 60 seconds.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, reinitializing dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for backend interactions including user profiles, admin checks, published tests, questions, test submission, results, leaderboard, and admin mutations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining Tailwind base/utilities, OKLCH-based navy color palette CSS variables for light/dark themes, and custom utility classes for navy colors and gradients.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/Admin.tsx: Admin panel page that checks authentication and admin status, redirecting unauthorized users, and renders tabbed sections for managing questions, tests, users, results, and leaderboard.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Dashboard page for authenticated users showing stat cards (tests attempted, average score, best score) and a list of published tests, with a profile setup modal if no profile exists.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Landing/home page with a hero section, CTA to login or navigate to dashboard, and a profile setup modal triggered for newly authenticated users without a profile.
frontend/src/pages/Leaderboard.tsx: Empty leaderboard page file with no content.
frontend/src/pages/Results.tsx: Results page that displays a table of the authenticated user's past test submissions with scores, percentages, and submission dates, mapped to test names.
frontend/src/pages/Test.tsx: Test-taking page that renders questions one at a time with a timer, tracks user answers, handles submission, and shows a post-submission answer review with correct/incorrect indicators.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining a custom theme with navy color palette, OKLCH CSS variables, custom fonts, border radii, shadows, accordion animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Project state snapshot for 'Concept Delta', a Navy Blue-themed MHT-CET test series site, documenting architecture, existing features, known issues (admin navbar link missing), and build requirements including Motoko backend, Internet Identity auth, and image-based questions.
